untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of realized volatility against its own historical average (dynamic threshold), which cannot be expressed with static allowed indicators. hvol_20 is a point-in-time volatility measure, not a comparison operator against a rolling mean of itself. A proper implementation would require a custom volatility regime detector or a rolling mean of hvol_20 values, neither of which are in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The core logic (reduce risk when vol high, increase when vol low) is bidirectional and applies to multiple asset classes/factors. However, without a true 'historical volatility average' indicator or regime detection mechanism, this cannot be precisely translated. Recommend: (1) implement custom hvol_20_sma indicator, or (2) use HIGH_VOL regime detection and reduce position sizing accordingly.
